name: Resources
description: The resources pattern is used to display a collection of resources. Each resource can include a title and optional image, description, author(s), and publication date.
usage:
The resources presents a variety of resources at a glance on one level. It supports between 1 and 5 categories (video, webinar, case study, blog, solution brief, white paper, report, etc.), each containing 1–5 items using the [Article block](/sites/construct/article-block). This layout is intended for cases where showing multiple types of resources in a compact view.  
  
For blog, it supports both static content and API-fetched blog posts by tag/category. Imported blog descriptions are truncated after 180 characters. If a specific blog article needs to be included, a static description must be provided.

### When to use

*   To present various curated resource types at a glance
*   To supplement a page where resources are not the main content
*   To provide quick access to mixed resource formats in a compact layout

### When not to use

*   When the content is limited to the recent blog posts only; use the [Blog](/sites/construct/blog) pattern instead

table.name: Rule
table.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new section.

table.name: Heading
table.description: The section heading communicates the primary subject or theme of the section.

table.name: Body
table.description: A description that provides introductory context for the section. It appears at the top of the section and helps users understand the purpose or scope of the content before engaging with the content below.

table.name: CTA block
table.description: The CTA (call to action) block presents one or more related actions that guide the user toward the next step within a section

table.name: Category
table.description: The category is a structural grouping element used to organize related resource blocks under a shared theme or topic.

table.name: Article blocks
table.description: [Article block](wiki-ref://grid-ymtdOF6n4R/i-5BuOzbNcXV) is a content unit that represents an individual resource item within a listing. It displays a title, a cover image, a description, and citation metadata. The block supports a range of resource types, including blog posts, videos, webinars, case studies, solution briefs, white papers, and reports.

table.name: Muted rule
table.description: The muted rule indicates the start of a new category. It appears from the second category onward.

properties.name: Section rule
properties.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new pattern
properties.constraint: Only use the default style for the section-level rule

properties.name: Linked heading
properties.description: The heading may function as a link when clearly indicated.

properties.name: Categories
properties.description: List of categories, containing category title and 1 to 5 article blocks
properties.constraint: 2-5 categories can be displayed within a single section

properties.name: Category heading
properties.description: 2-column width H3 heading in muted heading style

properties.name: Bottom padding
properties.description: The type of padding applied to the bottom of the pattern

properties.name: Primary CTA
properties.description: The CTA used with the positive button style. It indicates a high-priority, positive action and is reserved for hero areas or other key call-to-action sections.

properties.name: Secondary CTA
properties.description: The CTA using the default button style. It is used for most actions that are positive but not primary, and may serve as the main CTA in non-hero sections.

properties.name: Link CTA
properties.description: The text link used for contextual actions or pathways to more information. It uses a chevron (›) to indicate navigation to additional content or pages.

properties.name: Article title
properties.description: Title configuration for the article; functions as a link to the resource

properties.name: Article description
properties.description:
Description text for the article
Dynamic: displays the first 180 characters of the article. 
Static: a custom description should be provided.
properties.constraint:
Dynamic: 180 characters (with the truncation)
Static: up to 300 characters

properties.name: Citation author
properties.description: Author name text in the citation

properties.name: Citation date
properties.description: Publishing date in the citation format “DD Month YYYY”

properties.name: Image
properties.description: Cover image for the article. In the blog pattern, it is required and falls back to a default image when not provided. In the resources pattern, it supports 16:9 image, logo, or none as options.

properties.name: Citation
properties.description: Author/date field in small text and supports showing either or both.
